scoring_context: dynasty superflex IDP (DLF expert consensus, full-board DL/LB/DB)
notes: DLF full-board IDP rankings (185 players). Ranks are the average of three expert rankers (FrankG, Jason K, Justin T). Ingested as a rank signal via the scraper bridge; the contract loader inverts rank to a synthetic value so the ordinal sort matches DLF's published order. Not a backbone source — IDPTradeCalc remains authoritative.
